problem id: c24e1a48
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  11000100 -> 01100010
  01110011 -> 10111001
  01000000 -> 00100000
  11101010 -> 01110101
  01111101 -> 10111110
  11000000 -> 01100000
  10001010 -> 01000101
  01101101 -> 10110110
  00000111 -> 10000011
  01011110 -> 00101111

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 00010001
